title: Lab 12.5: Approved Execution
summary: The system now resolves the approved proposal into concrete capability selection and final placement under authoritative control.
decision_question: What changes when execution becomes resolution instead of hidden replanning?

surfaces.name: edge projection
queries: show the approved route hint strategy

surfaces.name: cloud authority
queries: show selected capabilities for approved execution

proposal.summary: The approved plan keeps the route hint at the edge while preserving final branch authorization and policy evaluation in the cloud.
assumptions: edge-generated hints are advisory and can be validated centrally
cloud execution still owns the authoritative branch decision

validation.summary: Authority confirms that the revised proposal can now be resolved into an executable placement plan.
authority_notes: approval is now tied directly to a concrete execution path

execution.summary: Execution binds the proposal to concrete capabilities without inventing a new plan on the fly.
placement: route hint generation runs at the edge
final route authorization remains in the cloud
trace writing remains in the authoritative zone

trace.summary: The system records the approved proposal and the execution summary, but not yet a complete replayable artifact chain.
queries: show which capabilities were selected for the approved plan
show where the final resolution executed

functions.planning: Planning has finished; its output is now an approved decision surface rather than a hidden guess.
functions.validation: Validation no longer negotiates, it confirms the proposal that execution must honor.
functions.execution: Execution resolves an approved plan into concrete placement and capability selection without changing its architectural meaning.

expectations: Execution should feel narrower and more disciplined once planning and validation have already done their work.
The remaining gap is trace richness, not proposal clarity.
runtime_decisions: the final route still depends on cloud authority, but the edge now contributes a visible hint instead of an invisible shortcut
execution honors the approved proposal instead of silently improvising a different composition
